{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Rojric Little
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Kings and Killers (novel)|Of Kings and Killers]]
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Rojric Little]] is [[Calder]]'s body double.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The fake Calder swept a bow. “Rojric Little, at your service.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
